title: cephaelis kappleri
intro: Cephaelis kappleri, also known as Kappler's tea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Cephaelis kappleri is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever and treating various respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
